title: PMS Elves Behavin Badly Magic Show Set with 150 Amazing Tricks - Children's Elf Magic Set For Ages 8+
features: Elves Behavin' Badly Elf 150 Trick Amazing Magic Set
Includes Magic Wand, Card Tricks, Instructions and Much More, Magic Made Easy for children Aged 8 +
Magic Made Easy: The perfect magic set for children 8 years old + and includes high quality, child friendly props that have been designed for young hands.

Looking for the ultimate magic tricks for children? This magician set is a great gift for boys or girls and is fantastic for all skill levels, no prior magic experience is needed. Ideal for beginners or budding young magicians!
Easy to Follow Instructions Booklet Included.
description: Create your very own magic show with Elfie, easy to use tricks with instructions included. Ideal gift for the elves behavin badly trickster. Made from fine yet quality materials to have a decorative design.
